first_error_text: HEXA_BIN_MISSING at 2026-04-19T15:48:48Z — forward_with_lora stub RC_ERR_CUDA_TODO (-5), awaiting BG agent a48c754f6c52a490a to land v5 CUDA + hexa native bootstrap
first_error_note: Pod fresh-restart has no hexa binary installed AND no anima repo staged AND no corpus downloaded. The downstream blocker (hxqwen14b_forward_with_lora → -5) is therefore guarded behind an earlier bootstrap blocker. Watchdog spawn_trainer() detects HEXA_BIN_MISSING first; once bootstrap lands (hexa binary + anima repo + corpus), next retry will hit the true RC_ERR_CUDA_TODO from hxqwen14b.c forward stub. Both markers share the BLOCKED_FFI retry loop path.
bootstrap_prereqs_missing_on_pod: /workspace/hexa-lang/self/native/libhxqwen14b.so with v5 CUDA kernels (the original hard blocker)
bootstrap_hand_off: BG agent a48c754f6c52a490a (hxqwen14b Day-2 CUDA) is responsible for the final blocker. Pod resupply (hexa bin + anima + corpus + rclone) is a separate short task; when it completes, watchdog immediately transitions from HEXA_BIN_MISSING → RC_ERR_CUDA_TODO. Retries continue until CUDA lands.
